requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — INEN Conformity and Ecuador Installation Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——INEN合格评定及厄瓜多尔安装要求
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——INEN合格評定及厄瓜多安裝要求

summary.en: Ecuador's national standards body INEN (Instituto Ecuatoriano de Normalización) is an IEC Affiliate member and adopts IEC standards as the basis for Ecuadorian national standards (NTE INEN) and mandatory technical regulations (RTE INEN). EV charger equipment imported into Ecuador is subject to INEN's conformity assessment framework: regulated electrical products require an INEN Certificate of Conformity (INEN-1) from an SAE (Servicio de Acreditación Ecuatoriano)-accredited or INEN-recognised certification body before customs clearance. Whether EV charging equipment currently falls under a specific RTE INEN mandatory technical regulation could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; exporters must verify the applicable regulation and product scope directly with INEN at normalizacion.gob.ec. The applicable international safety standard for EV conductive charging systems is IEC 61851-1:2017 (general requirements) and IEC 61851-23:2023 (DC EV charging stations). Enclosure protection requirements for the Ecuadorian climate depend on installation environment: coastal areas (high humidity, salt air) and Andean high-altitude environments (temperature variation, UV) present distinct ingress-protection challenges. IP65 for outdoor AC chargers and IP54 for outdoor DC units, per IEC 60529, are appropriate minimum ratings for exposed installations.
summary.zh: 厄瓜多尔国家标准机构INEN（厄瓜多尔标准化研究院）是IEC附属成员，以IEC标准为基础制定厄瓜多尔国家标准（NTE INEN）和强制技术法规（RTE INEN）。进口至厄瓜多尔的电动汽车充电桩设备须遵守INEN合格评定框架：受管制电气产品在清关前须持有SAE（厄瓜多尔认可服务机构）认可或INEN承认的认证机构签发的INEN合格证书（INEN-1）。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认电动汽车充电设备目前是否须遵守具体的RTE INEN强制技术法规；出口商须直接通过normalizacion.gob.ec向INEN核实适用法规及产品范围。电动汽车传导充电系统适用的国际安全标准为IEC 61851-1:2017（通用要求）和IEC 61851-23:2023（直流电动汽车充电站）。厄瓜多尔气候环境下的外壳防护要求取决于安装环境：沿海地区（高湿度、盐雾）和安第斯山区高海拔环境（温差大、紫外线强）对防护等级提出了不同要求。室外安装至少应采用IEC 60529规定的IP65（户外交流充电桩）和IP54（户外直流充电桩）防护等级。
summary.zht: 厄瓜多國家標準機構INEN（厄瓜多標準化研究院）是IEC附屬成員，以IEC標準為基礎制定厄瓜多國家標準（NTE INEN）和強制技術法規（RTE INEN）。進口至厄瓜多的電動汽車充電樁設備須遵守INEN合格評定框架：受管制電氣產品在清關前須持有SAE（厄瓜多認可服務機構）認可或INEN承認的認證機構簽發的INEN合格證書（INEN-1）。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認電動汽車充電設備目前是否須遵守具體的RTE INEN強制技術法規；出口商須直接通過normalizacion.gob.ec向INEN核實適用法規及產品範圍。電動汽車傳導充電系統適用的國際安全標準為IEC 61851-1:2017（通用要求）和IEC 61851-23:2023（直流電動汽車充電站）。厄瓜多氣候環境下的外殼防護要求取決於安裝環境：沿海地區（高濕度、鹽霧）和安第斯山區高海拔環境（溫差大、紫外線強）對防護等級提出了不同要求。室外安裝至少應採用IEC 60529規定的IP65（戶外交流充電樁）和IP54（戶外直流充電樁）防護等級。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment (second edition)
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code) — IP65 outdoor AC, IP54 outdoor DC minimum
INEN Certificate of Conformity (INEN-1) requirement for regulated electrical product imports
NTE INEN / RTE INEN — applicable INEN technical standards and mandatory regulations; verify current EV charger scope with INEN at normalizacion.gob.ec

summary.en: China's comparable safety baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements, in force April 2024), which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but incorporates China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence is useful as an engineering starting point but does not substitute for IEC 61851-accredited test reports required for an INEN Certificate of Conformity. China CCC certification covers some EVSE scope domestically but is not recognised by INEN as an equivalent to the Ecuador INEN-1 conformity route.
summary.zh: 中国可比安全基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023（电动汽车传导充电系统第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号及通信要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据可作为工程起点，但不能替代INEN合格证书所需的IEC 61851认可测试报告。中国CCC认证在国内覆盖部分EVSE范围，但INEN不将其视为厄瓜多尔INEN-1合格评定路径的等同方案。
summary.zht: 中國可比安全基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號及通訊要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據可作為工程起點，但不能替代INEN合格證書所需的IEC 61851認可測試報告。中國CCC認證在國內覆蓋部分EVSE範圍，但INEN不將其視為厄瓜多INEN-1合格評定路徑的等同方案。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (in force April 2024)
China CCC mandatory certification (where in domestic scope)

gap.en: Exporters should prepare: (1) an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix and accredited IEC safety test reports from an ILAC-recognised or SAE-accredited laboratory; (2) IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC charging stations; (3) IP65 / IP54 enclosure certificates per IEC 60529, with consideration for Ecuador's coastal humidity, salt-air, and Andean high-altitude UV and temperature-variation environments; (4) confirmation that input-voltage and frequency ratings cover 120 V / 60 Hz; (5) an INEN-1 Certificate of Conformity from an INEN-recognised certification body — verify the applicable RTE INEN and product scope with INEN before shipment; (6) Spanish-language installation instructions and labelling where required by Ecuador customs or distribution companies. A standalone GB/T 18487 test report does not establish INEN conformity without a clause-level gap assessment against applicable IEC standards.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备：(1) IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵及ILAC认可或SAE认可实验室出具的IEC安全测试报告；(2) 直流充电站的IEC 61851-23证据；(3) 符合IEC 60529的IP65 / IP54外壳认证书，并考虑厄瓜多尔沿海高湿度、盐雾及安第斯山区高海拔紫外线和温差环境；(4) 输入电压和频率额定值覆盖120 V / 60 Hz的确认；(5) 由INEN认可认证机构签发的INEN-1合格证书——出货前须向INEN核实适用的RTE INEN和产品范围；(6) 厄瓜多尔海关或配电公司要求的西班牙语安装说明和标签。在未对适用IEC标准完成逐条差距评估的情况下，单独的GB/T 18487测试报告不能证明INEN合格性。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備：(1) IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣及ILAC認可或SAE認可實驗室出具的IEC安全測試報告；(2) 直流充電站的IEC 61851-23證據；(3) 符合IEC 60529的IP65 / IP54外殼認證書，並考慮厄瓜多沿海高濕度、鹽霧及安第斯山區高海拔紫外線和溫差環境；(4) 輸入電壓和頻率額定值覆蓋120 V / 60 Hz的確認；(5) 由INEN認可認證機構簽發的INEN-1合格證書——出貨前須向INEN核實適用的RTE INEN和產品範圍；(6) 厄瓜多海關或配電公司要求的西班牙語安裝說明和標籤。在未對適用IEC標準完成逐條差距評估的情況下，單獨的GB/T 18487測試報告不能證明INEN合格性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — INEN-1 Certificate of Conformity required for regulated electrical product imports; IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23 are the applicable international safety standards; verify current EV charger RTE INEN scope with INEN before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; China CCC is not recognised by INEN as an Ecuador INEN-1 substitute without additional accredited IEC-basis testing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as an engineering starting point only. Ecuador-facing EVSE exports require an INEN-1 Certificate of Conformity based on IEC 61851 accredited evidence. Confirm the RTE INEN scope for EV chargers with INEN before shipment. IP-rated enclosure certificates and input-voltage / 60 Hz confirmation are also required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为工程起点。面向厄瓜多尔的EVSE出口须持有基于IEC 61851认可证据的INEN-1合格证书。出货前须向INEN确认电动汽车充电桩的RTE INEN适用范围。还须提供IP防护等级认证书及输入电压 / 60 Hz确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為工程起點。面向厄瓜多的EVSE出口須持有基於IEC 61851認可證據的INEN-1合格證書。出貨前須向INEN確認電動汽車充電樁的RTE INEN適用範圍。還須提供IP防護等級認證書及輸入電壓 / 60 Hz確認。
